name: Gnat
description: An annoying flying insect that deals almost no damage, but loves drifting in to shove you at the worst possible moment. Its real value is in the meat, fuzz, and the fact it can be tamed.

attacks.name: Boop
attacks.tell: It floats in and bumps you with its body rather than making a real attack.
attacks.howToAvoid: It rarely deals real damage; just swat it away or shoot it first.
attacks.notes: Its purpose is to shove and disrupt your footing, not kill you.

specialTraits: It can be tamed with Spoiled Meat Slurry. A tamed gnat grants the Gnat Friend bonus, and at night they often ignore bait if they are already circling a lamp.
behavior: It spends almost all of its time airborne, flying in clumsy, erratic patterns. At night many swarm around large garden lights and rarely come down.
interactionWithPlayer: It does not try to bite you; it chases the player to deliver little boops that can knock you off branches, out of position, or into trouble. It also descends to eat Spoiled Meat Slurry placed by the player.
interactionWithCreatures: It barely interacts with other creatures; its main obsession is bothering the player. Otherwise it just buzzes around the yard and garden lights.
strategy: The easiest answer is a ranged weapon. Even a weak bow works; if you want to tame one, place Spoiled Meat Slurry on the ground away from night lamps.
